Example Page

2021 Cabernet Sauvignon Beauregard Ranch

Beauregard Vineyards was founded in 1945 by Amos and Cecilia Beauregard. Five generations later, Cabernet from the ranch in Bonny Doon, California is shaped by sandstone, Zayante sand, and the cooling Pacific just miles away.

Scores & Accolades

96 Points - Vinous

92 Points - Wine Enthusiast

Estate release | pricing on request

Current Release

96-point mountain Cabernet

Wine Specs

Estate detail woven into the tasting story

The specs, cellar cues, and tasting profile now live inside the same image field so the preview feels designed as one conversion-focused product story.

Vineyard

  • 10-acre estate parcel
  • Vines planted in 2005
  • 1,740 to 1,802 feet elevation

Site + Cellar

  • Zayante sand over sandstone
  • 4.56 miles from the Pacific
  • Native fermentation and French oak aging

Tasting Notes

  • In the Glass: Dark, impenetrable garnet.
  • The Nose: Crushed graphite, wild mountain mint, cassis, and dark cherry.
  • The Palate: Lean and muscular, with blackcurrant, cedar box, espresso, and fine-grained tannins.
